public-awareness-and-literacy.header: Launch public awareness campaigns on AI risks
public-awareness-and-literacy.body: The federal government should work with other levels of government and public institutions to promote data privacy awareness, identifying misinformation and disinformation, and risks including deepfakes and synthetic AI content.

public-education-on-ai.body: Building safe AI systems and public trust in AI
This memo is prepared in response to the Government of Canada's AI strategy taskforce, and focuses on the theme of building safe AI systems and strengthening public trust in AI.
BUILDING SAFE AI SYSTEMS AND PUBLIC TRUST IN AI
public-education-on-ai.reportTitle: Mary Wells Report Safety and Trust
